questions.question:
A disruption planning brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe node-maintenance guidance.

A ConfigMap named `disruption-planning-brief` already exists in namespace `disruption-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetNode` is `kind-cluster-worker`
- `pdbInventory` is `kubectl get pdb -A`
- `pdbDescribe` is `kubectl describe pdb api-pdb -n disruption-lab`
- `nodeWorkloadCheck` is `kubectl get pods -A -o wide --field-selector spec.nodeName=kind-cluster-worker`
- `cordonCommand` is `kubectl cordon kind-cluster-worker`
- `drainPreview` is `kubectl drain kind-cluster-worker --ignore-daemonsets --delete-emptydir-data --dry-run=client`
- `uncordonCommand` is `kubectl uncordon kind-cluster-worker`
- `safeRemediationNote` is `review PodDisruptionBudget impact before any non-dry-run drain`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/disruption-planning-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/disruption-planning-checklist.txt` with the sections `PDB Inventory`, `Node Workload Audit`, and `Safe Drain Sequence`

Do not run a live drain, do not delete Pods or PodDisruptionBudgets, and do not cordon or uncordon the node during this drill.

verification.description: The disruption planning brief ConfigMap uses the intended node target, PDB inspection commands, node workload audit, and safe drain guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact PDB inventory, node workload audit, and safe drain sequence commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe disruption guidance is removed
